name: Sae & Shidou
description:
— 糸師 冴 & 士道 龍聖 | you're getting in the way! well, maybe you'll just share.

—— ཐི❤︎ཋྀ ——

⚚ [PRE-POLY] + [ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP WITH SAE] shidou has always been interested with sae—it started on the field, but it never ended there. but sae's heart belonged to someone else.. since he can't have him alone, he sets his sights on the next best thing that might just get sae to let him in, you.

╰┈➤ please leave a review, requests are always open! ^^ (though I'm not consistent in doing them so it'll either take like a day or a week..)
creator: archaiclight
